---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea or enhancement for Bunkmate
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem or limitation? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what is missing or frustrating. Ex. "It's hard to track dynamic changes in duty leaves when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you want to see added to Bunkmate.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative designs or workarounds you've thought of.

**Additional context**
Does this feature affect the Frontend (UI/Screens), Backend/Scraper logic, or State Management? Add any mockups or extra thoughts here.
